PreToolUse.description: Block Edit/Write on HEURISTICS.log — append only via Bash >>

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); (print('BLOCKED: HEURISTICS.log is append-only. Use Bash: cat >> .claude/HEURISTICS.log') or sys.exit(2)) if fp.endswith('HEURISTICS.log') else sys.exit(0)"

PreToolUse.description: Block git commit during EXPLORE phase

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); phase=open('.claude/SESSION.md').read() if os.path.exists('.claude/SESSION.md') else ''; (print('BLOCKED: cannot commit during EXPLORE phase. Change .claude/SESSION.md PHASE to IMPLEMENT first.') or sys.exit(2)) if 'git commit' in cmd and 'PHASE: EXPLORE' in phase else sys.exit(0)"

PreToolUse.description: Block git push if tests have not been run this session

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); phase=open('.claude/SESSION.md').read() if os.path.exists('.claude/SESSION.md') else ''; (print('BLOCKED: .claude/SESSION.md shows TESTS_RUN: no. Run tests before pushing.') or sys.exit(1)) if 'git push' in cmd and 'TESTS_RUN: no' in phase else sys.exit(0)"

PostToolUse.description: Lint Python files after every write or edit

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['ruff','check',fp,'--quiet']) if fp.endswith('.py') else None"

PostToolUse.description: Run contract tests after any model or schema file is written

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); (print('[hook] Model file changed — running contract tests...') or subprocess.run(['pytest','tests/contracts/','-q'])) if re.search(r'(models|schemas).*\.py$',fp) else None"

PostToolUse.description: Warn if a requirements.txt is modified (dependency policy)

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('WARNING: requirements file modified. Ensure new dependency is justified per CLAUDE.md dependency policy.') if 'requirements' in fp else None"

UserPromptSubmit.description: Block /exit and /clear if /wrap has not been run this session

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('prompt','').strip(); is_exit=p in('/exit','/clear') or p.startswith(('/exit ','/clear ')); s=(open('.claude/SESSION.md').read() if os.path.exists('.claude/SESSION.md') else '') if is_exit else ''; wrapped='\nHEURISTICS_WRITTEN: yes' in '\n'+s; (print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'SESSION.md HEURISTICS_WRITTEN is not yes — run /wrap before exiting.'})) or sys.exit(2)) if is_exit and not wrapped else None"

SessionEnd.description: Warn if heuristics were not written this session

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os; s=open('.claude/SESSION.md').read() if os.path.exists('.claude/SESSION.md') else ''; open('.claude/HEURISTICS.log','a').write('WARNING: Session ended with HEURISTICS_WRITTEN: no. Append findings to .claude/HEURISTICS.log.\n') if 'HEURISTICS_WRITTEN: no' in s else None"

SessionEnd.description: Warn if SESSION.md was not updated in 2+ hours

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,time; f='.claude/SESSION.md'; print('WARNING: .claude/SESSION.md has not been updated in 2+ hours. Run /wrap before ending session.') if os.path.exists(f) and (time.time()-os.path.getmtime(f))>7200 else None"
